settings_teams_desc: Review your current memberships and manage team members inside the teams you belong to.
settings_teams_empty_desc: A system admin needs to create a team and add you before it appears here.
settings_team_create_desc: Create a new team workspace for your account.
settings_team_dialog_hint: Team details and member permissions take effect immediately after saving.
settings_team_details_desc: Review the current team profile, storage usage, and member permissions.
settings_team_archive_desc: The team will be archived and removed from your active workspace list.
settings_archived_teams_desc: Archived teams stay here until a team admin restores them or the retention window expires.
settings_team_members_desc: Add teammates, change their role, or remove access when needed.
settings_team_member_search_placeholder: Search members by username, email, or ID...
settings_team_member_filtered_empty_desc: Try another keyword or adjust the filters.
settings_team_member_identifier_desc: Enter an existing user's username or email address.
settings_team_remove_member_desc: This removes the selected user from the team workspace.
settings_team_no_members_desc: Add a teammate by username or email to start collaborating.
settings_team_webdav_desc_manager: Manage WebDAV credentials for this team workspace. Owners and admins can see all team accounts; members only see their own.
settings_team_webdav_desc_member: Manage your WebDAV credentials for this team workspace. Members can only view, enable, disable, or delete their own accounts.
settings_team_webdav_endpoint_hint: The WebDAV endpoint is shared globally. The credentials determine whether the client opens a personal or team workspace.
settings_team_webdav_create_desc: Create a WebDAV account scoped to this team workspace.
settings_team_webdav_empty_desc: Create a team WebDAV account to connect team files from Finder, File Explorer, or a third-party client.
settings_team_audit_desc: Review profile changes, member updates, and archive activity for this team.
settings_team_audit_empty_desc: Team management events will appear here in reverse chronological order.
settings_team_danger_zone_desc: Keep high-risk actions here so the impact stays obvious before execution.
settings_team_danger_zone_hint: Confirm another manager is still available and notify members before archiving the team.
settings_team_archive_confirm_label: Type the team name to confirm archiving
